{{Quote|I wish to have your surrender. I wish to have you alive. If I do not get my wish, if you take another step in attack, then the female will die. After that, I will cripple you if I can. Since the latter approach might lead to your accidental death, I prefer the former|Tsaak Vootuh to Anakin Solo|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest">''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]''</ref>}}
'''Tsaak Vootuh''' commanded the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] force on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]]. He was also responsible for arresting [[Mezhan Kwaad]] and [[Nen Yim]] for their heretical [[Shaping protocol|shaping]] of [[Tahiri Veila]]. However, when [[Anakin Solo]] and [[Vua Rapuung]] appeared, Anakin forced the commander to allow Vua to question Kwaad for her role in his shaming. Vootuh, hoping to capture the brother of [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] and gain advancement in the eyes of [[Warmaster]] [[Tsavong Lah]], reluctantly agreed. After Kwaad's confession, she killed Vootuh with her [[shaper hand]]. In review, Warmaster Lah said that it was better for Vootuh, as the Warmaster would have sacrificed him.
